---
name: Skill request
about: Propose a new skill or an enhancement to an existing one
title: "[skill] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Layer

Which plugin should this live in?

- [ ] `nexa-claude-core` (stack-agnostic)
- [ ] `nexa-claude-nextjs` (Next.js stack)
- [ ] A new stack plugin

## Phase

Inception / Elaboration / Construction / Verification / Delivery / Setup

## What problem does it solve

The concrete, repeatable task this skill would automate or guide.

## Proposed process

The ordered steps the skill would perform, and how it verifies success.

## Related skills

Any existing skills it overlaps with or should reference instead of duplicating.
